diagrams.title: Venn Diagram - Join Types Comparison
diagrams.description: Shows the overlap and coverage area for Inner Join, Left Outer Join, Right Outer Join, and Full Outer Join
diagrams.purpose: Visualize which tuples are included in each join type

diagrams.title: Theta Join Operation Flow
diagrams.description: Step-by-step flow showing Cartesian Product followed by Selection operation
diagrams.purpose: Understand that Theta join is a compound operation

diagrams.title: Division Operation Concept
diagrams.description: Visual representation showing X values that have association with ALL Y values
elements: Result = X values connected to every S element
Example: Students connected to ALL courses
diagrams.purpose: Grasp the 'for all' semantic of division operation

diagrams.title: Schema Evolution in Joins
diagrams.description: Shows how schemas combine in different join operations
diagrams.purpose: Understand attribute preservation in different join types

diagrams.title: Self-Join with Rename
diagrams.description: Example of joining Employee table with itself to find manager-employee pairs
